title: Human neuroblastoma cell line SH-SY5Y culturing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fvaec","text":"This is the brief protocol for seeding and culturing human neuroblastoma SH-SY5Y cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 1. SH-SY5Y cells (ATCC, Manassas, VA, USA, Cat# CRL-2266, RRID:CVCL_0019) were seeded at 70-80% density.
2. Change medium to DMEM/F12 supplemented with 15% FBS, 1% penicillin-streptomycin and 10μM retinoic acid (11320-033, Gibco) for differentiation for four days
creator: Jackson Schumacher
